title: Ramakien: The Thai Ramayana
source: Royal Thai manuscripts; Rama I version (1797)
description: Thailand's national epic: the Ramayana retold through Thai Buddhist sensibility, with Hanuman as the beloved trickster-hero.
introduction: Thailand's national epic: the Ramayana retold through Thai Buddhist sensibility, with Hanuman as the beloved trickster-hero.

translation.original_text: Phra Ram, the incarnation of Narai, descended to earth to destroy the demon Thotsakan.
